## What it does

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-GENERATED: overview -->
Independently grades HVE behavior-test evidence with fidelity-aware, severity-graded findings and a verdict. Dispatched by hve-builder-tester.
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED: overview -->
